selection_rationale.title: Functional specialization of hippocampal somatostatin-expressing interneurons
selection_rationale.reason: HIGH relevance. Directly addresses P4 (Tac1 for bistratified, Ndnf/Nkx2-1 for OLM) and P2 (combinatorial Cre/Flp transgenic approach bridging molecular markers to morphological types). Citation trail likely leads to primary patch-seq and intersectional genetics datasets.

selection_rationale.title: Common Origins of Hippocampal Ivy and Nitric Oxide Synthase Expressing Neurogliaform Cells
selection_rationale.reason: HIGH relevance. Central paper for P3 (Ivy vs NGC boundary): demonstrates IvC and nNOS+ NGC share MGE origin and constitute a single subtype; nNOS- NGC from CGE. Citation trail will reach the primary lineage tracing and electrophysiology studies defining this boundary.

selection_rationale.title: Dendritic Inhibition Provided by Interneuron-Specific Cells Controls the Firing Rate and Timing of the Hippocampal Feedback Inhibitory Circuitry
selection_rationale.reason: HIGH relevance. Primary characterisation of IS3 cells (VIP+/CR+) with soma at O/A border and unipolar dendrites; directly addresses P3 (IS subtype split). Citations likely reach IS-1 and IS-2 primary descriptions and VIP interneuron classification studies.

selection_rationale.title: Synaptic and dendritic architecture of different types of hippocampal somatostatin interneurons
selection_rationale.reason: HIGH relevance. Quantitative comparison of OLM vs hippocampo-septal cells using EM reconstructions; directly addresses P5 (HS cell characterisation) and P1 (soma locations in str. oriens). Citation trail will reach primary HS cell identification papers.

selection_rationale.title: Behavior-dependent activity patterns of GABAergic long-range projecting neurons in the rat hippocampus
selection_rationale.reason: HIGH relevance. Primary data on hippocampo-septal and other long-range SOM+ GABAergic projecting neurons in CA1 str. oriens; directly addresses P5 and P1. Citations will reach the foundational HS cell papers (Gulyas, Jinno, Takacs).

selection_rationale.title: Transcriptional and morphological profiling of parvalbumin interneuron subpopulations in the mouse hippocampus
selection_rationale.reason: HIGH relevance. Patch-seq study of PV interneurons showing transcriptomic continuity despite morphological divergence (basket vs axo-axonic); directly addresses P2 (transcriptomic bridging) and P4 (PV subtype boundaries). Citations will reach key PV classification and single-cell studies.

selection_rationale.title: Discrete interneuron subsets participate in GluN1/GluN3A excitatory glycine receptor (eGlyR)-mediated regulation of hippocampal network activity throughout development and evolution
selection_rationale.reason: HIGH relevance. Uses scRNA-seq to distinguish Lamp5+/Lhx6+ MGE-derived Ivy cells from Lamp5+/Lhx6- CGE-derived NGCs; nNOS in putative NGFCs in SLM; directly addresses P3 (Ivy/NGC boundary) and P4 (Nos1 universality in NGC). Citations will reach the Allen Brain Atlas taxonomy and Lamp5 subclass studies.

selection_rationale.title: Interneuronal mechanisms of hippocampal theta oscillations in a full-scale model of the rodent CA1 circuit
selection_rationale.reason: HIGH relevance summaries but primarily a computational modelling paper. New morphological data for ivy/NGC are useful but citations will mostly lead to general connectivity/oscillation literature rather than cell-type characterisation primaries.

selection_rationale.title: High and low expression of the hyperpolarization activated current (I h) in mouse CA1 stratum oriens interneurons
selection_rationale.reason: HIGH relevance for OLM electrophysiology but narrowly focused on Ih current in str. oriens cells. Citation trail unlikely to reach multimodal bridging datasets or address key priority gaps beyond OLM, which is already well-characterised.

selection_rationale.title: Novel Hippocampal Interneuronal Subtypes Identified Using Transgenic Mice That Express Green Fluorescent Protein in GABAergic Interneurons
selection_rationale.reason: HIGH relevance for OLM soma confirmation but older GIN mouse study (2006). Most citations will be to earlier foundational papers already well-known; less likely to yield modern transcriptomic or multimodal bridging references.

selection_rationale.title: Local and long-range GABAergic circuits in hippocampal area CA1 and their link to Alzheimer's disease
selection_rationale.reason: HIGH relevance as comprehensive review but reviews are deprioritised for traversal; their citations cover too broad a range. Key facts already captured in summaries.

selection_rationale.title: Cell type-specific expression of Eps8 in the mouse hippocampus
selection_rationale.reason: MODERATE relevance. Eps8 marker characterisation in CCK/calbindin interneurons in str. radiatum; tangential to key priorities. Not addressing any of P1-P5 directly.

selection_rationale.title: Dendritic inhibition mediated by O-LM and bistratified interneurons in the hippocampus
selection_rationale.reason: HIGH relevance for OLM/bistratified characterisation but a review paper. OLM and bistratified soma locations already well-captured; citations will overlap heavily with other selected papers.

selection_rationale.title: Molecular Specialization of GABAergic Synapses on the Soma and Axon in Cortical and Hippocampal Circuit Function and Dysfunction
selection_rationale.reason: HIGH relevance for CCK basket cell CB1 expression but a review focused on synaptic molecular specialisation. CCK basket cell markers already captured; citation trail unlikely to reach bridging datasets.

selection_rationale.title: Comprehensive Estimates of Potential Synaptic Connections in Local Circuits of the Rodent Hippocampal Formation by Axonal-Dendritic Overlap
selection_rationale.reason: MODERATE relevance. Connectivity estimates paper; does not address markers, transcriptomics, or any of P1-P5 directly.

selection_rationale.title: Electrophysiological and Morphological Characterization of Chrna2 Cells in the Subiculum and CA1 of the Hippocampus: An Optogenetic Investigation
selection_rationale.reason: HIGH relevance for Chrna2/OLM characterisation but narrow focus. OLM soma in SO already well-established from multiple sources; citation trail covered by selecting 258397933 which uses Chrna2-INs in intersectional approach.

selection_rationale.title: Differential Expression of Group I Metabotropic Glutamate Receptors in Functionally Distinct Hippocampal Interneurons
selection_rationale.reason: HIGH relevance for OLM mGluR1 expression and soma location but narrowly focused on glutamate receptor physiology. OLM characterisation already saturated.

selection_rationale.title: Role of Ionotropic Glutamate Receptors in Long-Term Potentiation in Rat Hippocampal CA1 Oriens-Lacunosum Moleculare Interneurons
selection_rationale.reason: MODERATE relevance. Synaptic plasticity study in OLM cells; mentions str. oriens diversity but does not address key priorities directly.

selection_rationale.title: Morpho-physiological Criteria Divide Dentate Gyrus Interneurons into Classes
selection_rationale.reason: LOW relevance. Dentate gyrus interneurons, not CA1. Does not address any of the 9 target cell types.

selection_rationale.title: Molecular and electrophysiological features of GABAergic neurons in the dentate gyrus reveal limited homology with cortical interneurons
selection_rationale.reason: LOW relevance. Dentate gyrus focus; general classification framework but not applicable to key priorities.

selection_rationale.title: Subcellular sequencing of single neurons reveals the dendritic transcriptome of GABAergic interneurons
selection_rationale.reason: MODERATE relevance. Transcriptomic identification in cultured hippocampal neurons; in vitro context limits utility for soma location confirmation. Citation trail less likely to reach in vivo bridging datasets.

selection_rationale.title: Interneuron diversity in the rat dentate gyrus: An unbiased in vitro classification
selection_rationale.reason: LOW relevance. Dentate gyrus interneurons; does not address any of the 9 CA1 target cell types.

selection_rationale.title: Cell Type-Specific Expression of Acid-Sensing Ion Channels in Hippocampal Interneurons
selection_rationale.reason: MODERATE relevance. Distinguishes FS basket vs OLM but narrowly focused on ASIC channels. Key facts already captured.

selection_rationale.title: Hippocampal GABAergic interneurons and memory
selection_rationale.reason: HIGH relevance as comprehensive review covering all 9 types including IS subtypes and Lamp5/ivy/NGC classification. However, reviews are deprioritised for traversal since their citation breadth dilutes relevance. Key facts already extracted in summaries.

selection_rationale.title: Immunofluorescent visualization of mouse interneuron subtypes
selection_rationale.reason: MODERATE relevance. Antibody validation methods paper for PV/CB/SST/CR markers; does not address key priorities directly.

selection_rationale.title: Molecular and Electrophysiological Characterization of GFP-Expressing CA1 Interneurons in GAD65-GFP Mice
selection_rationale.reason: MODERATE relevance. CGE-derived interneuron characterisation; NPY+ ivy/NGC subgroup useful but narrow. Citation trail partially covered by selecting 2405079 and 282312227 which address ivy/NGC boundary more directly.

selection_rationale.title: Inhibitory control of hippocampal inhibitory neurons
selection_rationale.reason: HIGH relevance for IS subtype descriptions but a review. IS subtype facts already captured; selecting 23480858 (primary IS3 data) provides better citation trail to IS-1/IS-2 primary sources.
